description: Create a unified knowledge document or knowledge directory. New documents and folders inherit inject mode and AI edit config from the parent directory by default, and top-level folders inherit the type defaults. Document creation may include initial content. Directory creation only creates the folder structure; metadata and config use dedicated knowledge tools. Returns a plain-text status line.

kind.description: Whether to create a knowledge document or a knowledge directory.

path.description: Target type-prefixed path, for example `design/combat/hit-reaction.md` or `skill/build/release.md`.

document.description: Document-only initial content. Omit it to create with path-derived defaults and empty content sections.

maintenanceRules.description: Optional document-level maintenance rules. Omit it to keep inheriting the parent directory AI config on create.
